creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: clsung
Date: Fri Jun 21 03:24:55 2013
New Revision: 321437
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321437

Log:
  net/tweepy: Update to 2.0, install unzipped
  
  - Update to 2.0
  - Patch setup.py to install zip_safe=False
  - Add pkg-plist
  - Remove PLIST_FILES accordingly
  - Whitespace alignment
  
  Changes:
  
  https://github.com/tweepy/tweepy/blob/2.0/CHANGELOG.md
  
  PR:		ports/179574
  Submitted by:	koobs@

Added:
  head/net/py-tweepy/files/
  head/net/py-tweepy/files/patch-setup.py   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/py-tweepy/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/net/py-tweepy/Makefile
  head/net/py-tweepy/distinfo

Modified: head/net/py-tweepy/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/py-tweepy/Makefile	Fri Jun 21 03:10:20 2013	(r321436)
+++ head/net/py-tweepy/Makefile	Fri Jun 21 03:24:55 2013	(r321437)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	tweepy
-PORTVERSION=	1.13
+PORTVERSION=	2.0
 CATEGORIES=	net python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -12,9 +12,7 @@ COMMENT=	A library for accessing the Twi
 
 LICENSE=	MIT
 
-USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYTHON=		yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 
-PLIST_FILES=	%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%
-
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/net/py-tweepy/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/py-tweepy/distinfo	Fri Jun 21 03:10:20 2013	(r321436)
+++ head/net/py-tweepy/distinfo	Fri Jun 21 03:24:55 2013	(r321437)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (tweepy-1.13.tar.gz) = c57b8efcb1edd2c973bc4f1a96aaed413f67180d45d35ea492e2c4bf318a53bd
-SIZE (tweepy-1.13.tar.gz) = 22382
+SHA256 (tweepy-2.0.tar.gz) = a0b3b6ab85e9bd56907a5883085cf208b3bd3a44272fd25e38a8ac1038eb25ad
+SIZE (tweepy-2.0.tar.gz) = 22091

Added: head/net/py-tweepy/files/patch-setup.py
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/py-tweepy/files/patch-setup.py	Fri Jun 21 03:24:55 2013	(r321437)
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+--- ./setup.py.orig	2013-06-16 00:45:48.756665404 +1000
++++ ./setup.py	2013-06-16 00:45:58.696879511 +1000
+@@ -12,4 +12,4 @@
+       url="http://github.com/tweepy/tweepy",
+       packages = find_packages(),
+       keywords= "twitter library",
+-      zip_safe = True)
++      zip_safe = False)

Added: head/net/py-tweepy/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/py-tweepy/pkg-plist	Fri Jun 21 03:24:55 2013	(r321437)
@@ -0,0 +1,44 @@
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/PKG-INFO
